title: Halcor Raystel

{{Quote|Putting an end to a three-month scandal in the halls of higher learning on Alderaan, Provost Dalus Othona formally censured and suspended Dean Halcor Raystel.|A HoloNet News report, on the suspension of the Dean|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Halcor Raystel''' was the [[Dean/Legends|dean]] of the [[University of Alderaan/Legends|University of Alderaan]] just prior to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|outbreak]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] reported on the dean on [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3:14]], who was censured and had his title revoked after he [[Reproduction/Legends|propositioned]] two students in exchange for course credits and became addicted to the [[Spice/Legends|substance]] [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]]. Disgraced, Raystel retreated to his [[Halcor Raystel's cottage|cottage]] on the planet [[Delaya/Legends|Delaya]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|The charges compounded when it was revealed that Raystel propositioned two female students, offering course credits in exchange for personal relations.|A HoloNet News report, on the suspension of the Dean|<ref name="HNN" />}}
[[File:UniversityOfAldera.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Raystel was dean of the University of Alderaan (pictured).]]
Halcor Raystel was,<ref name="HNN" /> until just before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|start]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="22 BBY">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|life/13314_2.html|Dean of Aldera Suspended}} is [[Great ReSynchronization|dated]] 13:3:14, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]]. {{InsiderCite|84|Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241}} dates the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] to 16:5:21.</ref> the [[Dean/Legends|dean]] of the [[University of Alderaan/Legends|University of Alderaan]]. The [[University/Legends|university]],<ref name="HNN" /> located in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] [[Aldera/Legends|Aldera]] on<ref name="Aldera">{{CSWECite|I|19|Aldera}}</ref> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]],<ref name="Alderaan">{{Film|IV}}</ref> had appointed him as dean despite him not holding any outstanding credentials. This resulted in ongoing claims of favoritism and brought disrepute to the university.<ref name="HNN" />

During his tenure, Raystel offered course credits to two [[Gender/Legends|female]] students in exchange for [[Reproduction/Legends|sexual]] favors and started to abuse<ref name="HNN" /> the addictive [[Spice/Legends|substance]]<ref name="Ryll">{{CSWECite|III|118|Ryll}}</ref> [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]]. Raystel became erratic as a result of his ryll use, even during his many lectures. Several students complained about this, and the university launched an investigation that lasted three [[Standard month/Legends|months]], bringing scandal to all involved. The investigation uncovered his indecency with the two students as well as the substance abuse, which was uncovered by drug tests. As a result of the investigation, [[Provost/Legends|Provost]] [[Dalus Othona]] revoked Raystel's position as dean and censured him.<ref name="HNN" />

The disgraced dean withdrew to his [[Halcor Raystel's cottage|cottage]] on [[Delaya/Legends|Delaya]],<ref name="HNN" /> one of Alderaan's neighboring planets.<ref name="Delaya">{{CSWECite|I|180|Delaya}}</ref> On the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3:14]], the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] ran an article on the matter. The News outlet attempted to contact Raystel prior to publicizing the article, but he refused to comment on the matter.<ref name="HNN" />

==Personality and traits==
Halcor Raystel was a disreputable individual as he brought scandal to himself and the university as a result of his indecency and inappropriate behavior with students. He had an addictive personality that manifested itself when he became dependent on ryll, despite the negative effect it had on his lectures and professional career. Despite these character flaws and a lack of reputable credentials, Raystel was able to gain the title of dean and failed to further incriminate himself when approached by HoloNet News.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Halcor Raystel was first mentioned in the online article "Dean of Aldera Suspended" in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #47'']], an installment of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> It was published on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref> Raystel's name is a [[tuckerization]] of Charles Taylor,<ref name="HNN" /> webmaster of Aldera.net. Prior to the article being published, Taylor had been legally warned twice by [[Lucasfilm]] after posting scans of a storyboard for the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']] and concept art of [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] [[Punworcca 116-class interstellar sloop/Legends|''Punworcca 116''-class interstellar sloop]] to Aldera.net.<ref name="SFF">{{WebCite|url=http://www.sffchronicles.co.uk/forum/17314-episode-ii-attack-of-the-clones-spoilers.html|text=Episode II : Attack of the Clones. (Spoilers)|work=[https://www.sffchronicles.com Science Fiction Fantasy Chronicles]|archivedate=20100406183930|nolive=1}}</ref><ref name="CNN">{{WebCite|url=http://articles.cnn.com/2000-10-02/tech/lucasfilm_1_fan-sites-images-storyboards?_s=PM:TECH|text=Lucasfilm orders links to new 'Star Wars' images removed|date=2000-10-02|work=[[Wikipedia:CNN|Cable News Network]]|archivedate=20130316025541|nolive=1}}</ref>
